nouns.summary: He was “in agony” and, in that state, prayed more earnestly.
His sweat occurred and was described as coming down, taking on the form of clots.
Clots are described as coming down, and they are actively depicted as descending.
The clots are specifically described as “of blood,” tying the descending clots to blood.
The clots are portrayed as descending onto the earth.
